name: harvest-time-off
description: Harvest time-off CLI and OMP tool.

defaultHours.description: Hours per business day when the Harvest tool call omits hours.

holidayRegions.description: Comma-separated Holidays regions; defaults to Yukon, Canada.

command.description: Direct path to the harvest-time-off executable; credentials stay in HARVEST_ACCESS_TOKEN and HARVEST_ACCOUNT_ID.

workEntryCommand.description: Direct path to the Harvest work-entry executable.

projectTimeMappings.description: JSON mapping from OMP Project Time project names to Harvest project and task names.

projectTimeLogPath.description: Optional path to OMP Project Time's time-log.json; defaults to ~/.omp/project-time/time-log.json.
